items.name: chestnut
items.description: 🌰 Chestnut is a powerful encrypted storage library for Go, featuring Sparse Encryption, a novel technique for selectively encrypting struct fields. It supports Chained Encryption, custom encryption (AES256-CTR), multiple storage backends (BBolt, NutsDB), and built-in compression (Zstandard), offering unmatched flexibility for secure data storage.
